allow: Bash(python -m py_compile pose_estimator.py scoring.py visualizer.py history.py templates.py app.py)
PowerShell(python -c "import mediapipe; print\('mediapipe', mediapipe.__version__\); print\('has solutions:', hasattr\(mediapipe, 'solutions'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import mediapipe as m; print\(m.__version__, hasattr\(m,'solutions'\)\)")
Bash(timeout 15 python -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502 --server.headless true --browser.gatherUsageStats false)
